prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-87012DB-M-15PC-TT Product Type: FOOD_STORAGE_CONTAINER Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: 15pc 1.5 Inch Aluminum Storage Container Set Heavy Duty Hobby Craft Organizer Description: This 15pc aluminum storage container is the perfect accessory for any craft or hobby project. Each storage container is sealed with a plastic clear top, so even put away you can see what is being stored.

All 15 pieces fit snug inside its own carrying case so you can keep one project organized together, and even take it on the go. Search Terms: storage container set hobby craft Features: - Clear Top Inner Containers - Heavy Duty Aluminum - Carrying Case for Inner Containers - Carrying Case Dimensions: 7.5" x 4.5" - Inner Container Dimensions: 1.5" Diameter, .75" Depth === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 15-pc 1.5 Inch Aluminum Storage Container Set

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 15-pk 1.5 in Aluminum Storage Container Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Heavy Duty Aluminum, Clear Top Containers, Carrying Case Included, Hobby Craft Organizer, Portable

openai.title_differentiation: Clear Top Inner Containers, Heavy Duty Aluminum, Carrying Case, Portable 15 Piece Craft Organization
